targets.rawSql: SELECT cpu_load_percent AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE "time" > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT (ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100) AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE "time" > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT (disk_used_gb / NULLIF(disk_total_gb, 0) * 100) AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE "time" > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT temp_c AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE "time" > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND temp_c > 0 ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT avg_rx_mbps AS value FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket") ORDER BY "bucket" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT seconds_since_last AS value FROM public.v_uptime_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}'
SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', "time") AS "time", cpu_load_percent AS "CPU Load %" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', "time") AS "time", ram_used_mb AS "Used (MB)" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', "time") AS "time", ram_total_mb AS "Total (MB)" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1

SELECT mt."time", t.iface || ' Download' AS metric, (t.value->>'rx_mbps')::NUMERIC AS "Mbps" FROM public.machine_telemetry mt CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each(mt.interface_metrics) t(iface, value) WHERE $__timeFilter(mt."time") AND mt.machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND (t.value->>'rx_mbps')::NUMERIC > 0 UNION ALL SELECT mt."time", t.iface || ' Upload' AS metric, ((t.value->>'tx_mbps')::NUMERIC * -1) AS "Mbps" FROM public.machine_telemetry mt CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each(mt.interface_metrics) t(iface, value) WHERE $__timeFilter(mt."time") AND mt.machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND (t.value->>'tx_mbps')::NUMERIC > 0 ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", machine_id AS metric, avg_rx_mbps AS "Download (Mbps)" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE $__timeFilter("bucket") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", machine_id AS metric, (avg_tx_mbps * -1) AS "Upload (Mbps)" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE $__timeFilter("bucket") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1

SELECT "time", key AS "Interface", (value->>'errors')::NUMERIC AS "Errors" FROM public.machine_telemetry, jsonb_each(interface_metrics) WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("time") AND value ? 'errors' ORDER BY 1

SELECT "time", key AS "Interface", (value->>'drops')::NUMERIC AS "Drops" FROM public.machine_telemetry, jsonb_each(interface_metrics) WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("time") AND value ? 'drops' ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", max_temp_c AS "Temperature (°C)" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE $__timeFilter("bucket") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND max_temp_c > 0 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', "time") AS "time", AVG(disk_used_gb) AS "Used (GB)", AVG(disk_total_gb) AS "Total (GB)" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', "time") AS "time", AVG(ram_used_mb) AS "Used (MB)", AVG(ram_total_mb) AS "Total (MB)" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH stats AS (SELECT "bucket", machine_id, avg_cpu, AVG(avg_cpu) OVER w AS moving_avg, COALESCE(STDDEV(avg_cpu) OVER w, 0) AS moving_stddev FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket") WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY "bucket" ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)) SELECT "bucket" AS "time", CASE WHEN moving_stddev > 0 THEN (avg_cpu - moving_avg) / moving_stddev ELSE 0 END AS "Z-Score" FROM stats WHERE moving_avg > 0 ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", total_rx_errors AS "RX Errors" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket") ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", total_rx_drops AS "RX Drops" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket") ORDER BY 1
SELECT min_if_status AS value FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket") ORDER BY "bucket" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT SUM(total_rx_errors) AS value FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket")
SELECT SUM(total_rx_drops) AS value FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket")

WITH agg AS (SELECT SUM(total_rx_errors + total_rx_drops) AS total_issues, SUM(total_rx_errors + total_rx_drops + (avg_rx_mbps * 60 * 125000)) AS total_packets FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket")) SELECT CASE WHEN total_packets > 0 THEN ROUND(((total_issues::NUMERIC / total_packets::NUMERIC) * 100)::NUMERIC, 4) ELSE 0 END AS value FROM agg

SELECT "time", cpu_load_percent AS cpu_pct, (ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100) AS ram_pct, (disk_used_gb / NULLIF(disk_total_gb, 0) * 100) AS disk_pct, temp_c AS temp, net_rx_errors AS rx_err, net_rx_drops AS rx_drop, net_if_status AS if_status FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 50

list.name: machine_id
list.label: Machine
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT machine_id FROM public.machine_telemetry ORDER BY machine_id
